title: DICIMI Electric Wax Melt Burner - 3D Heart & LOVE Design Wax Warmer, Touch Control Oil Burner with 3 Heat Settings, UK-Friendly Flameless Melter for Wax Melts, Gifts for Her (Heart Shape)
features: 1. Thoughtful Design Crafted from sleek, mirror-finish glass, this wax melt burner emits a stunning three-dimensional heart effect and the word "LOVE" when lit—making it the perfect gift to express affection. An ideal electric wax melt burner for couples, mothers, or anyone seeking a stylish way to share love through fragrance. Compatible with all wax melts, it doubles as a decorative electric oil burner for modern homes.

2. Energy-Efficient & Eco-Friendly Equipped with two durable T25 bulbs (including a spare)—heat-resistant up to 300°C (oven-grade)—this electric wax melt burners UK favourite ensures rapid, even heating with consistent temperature control. Enjoy flameless operation: smoke-free, soot-free, and pollution-free for a cleaner, safer way to melt wax melts or aromatic oils.

3. Touch-Control Technology Our wax burner electric features intuitive touch-sensitive controls with three adjustable light/heat settings. Customize fragrance intensity and ambient lighting with this versatile electric wax melt burner, creating the perfect atmosphere for any moment. Designed for UK homes, it combines smart technology with electric oil burner functionality.

4. Hassle-Free Use Designed for convenience, this electric wax melt burners UK model includes removable wax trays for easy cleaning. Simply plug in, switch on, and enjoy long-lasting fragrance—no spills, no mess. A low-maintenance wax melt burner ideal for busy lifestyles.

5. The Perfect Gift With its elegant design and enchanting glow, this electric oil burner doubles as a heartfelt gift for Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day, or a chic addition for wax melts enthusiasts. A stylish electric wax melt burner suited for any space—homes, offices, or spas.
